summary.lv: Discover Cars meklē DevSecOps inženieru ar drošības fokusu, kurš integrēs drošību izstrādes procesā, pārvaldīs ievainojamības un veidos drošu infrastruktūru.
summary.en: Discover Cars seeks a DevSecOps Engineer (Security Focus) to embed security into development processes, manage vulnerabilities, and build secure infrastructure for a fast-growing travel tech company.
